cases.title: Stine v. Southern Florida Presbytery
cases.synopsis: The CJB found the complaint by member D. Stine against Southern Florida Presbytery to be in order and recommended that a commission be appointed to adjudicate the case. No further details of the substance of the complaint are provided in this report.
